title: Rhythm: business prose flow
description: Multi-paragraph business writing — sustained pro rhythm
text: The quarter exceeded all our internal targets. Revenue grew, churn dropped, and the team shipped twelve major features. Looking ahead, we have three priorities: expand into Europe, hire senior engineers, and double our content output. The next ninety days will define the year.

tips.text: This is what executives write daily — train it as a career skill
Three-part lists ("X, Y, and Z") have a built-in rhythm

tips.target: The quarter exceeded all our internal targets. Revenue grew, churn dropped, and the team shipped twelve major features. Looking ahead, we

tips.text: Metronome at 72 BPM — match it through all sentences

tips.target: have three priorities: expand into Europe, hire senior engineers, and double our content output. The next ninety days will define the year.

character_tips.anna: Executive-level prose at 72 WPM. This is real professional output.
character_tips.maxim: Hold this speed = type at the speed of business thinking.
character_tips.knopych: EXEC MODE ON! 💼 You're a typing CEO now!
character_tips.klavochka: Wise and steady, like a senior advisor, my precious 👔
